/usr/bin/ar qc libMeridianRuntime.a CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Core/FramePacer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Core/MainLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Core/Telemetry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/BytecodeDiskIndex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/DescriptorLifetimeCompactor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/DescriptorPoolCompactor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/DescriptorPoolPageAllocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/EffectGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/EffectQueueBatchLowerer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/EffectToRenderPassLowerer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/PersistentBytecodeStore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/PipelineCompatibilityCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/PipelineCompiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/PipelineObjectModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/PsoCompatibilityGrouper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/PsoObjectCompatibilityCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/QueueDomainLoweringCompiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/RenderDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/RenderPassCompatibility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/RenderPassMergePlanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/RenderPassObjectModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/RenderPreparationPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/ResidencyMigrationPlanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/ResourceDependencyCompiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/ResourceResidencyHistory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/ShaderBytecodeCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/ShaderReflection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/SwapchainModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/TransientAliasingPlanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeridianRuntime.dir/src/Renderer/TransientHeapAllocator.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libMeridianRuntime.a
